arts.ttl: Bigger mess than Man Utd: Ten Hag is RIGHT to snub Dortmund
arts.sum: Bigger mess than Man Utd: Ten Hag is RIGHT to snub Dortmund When he took the Man Utd job, the club was struggling and crying out for a 'disciplinarian.' The same is the case for Dortmund, who have several players on massive wages and who are unwilling to pull their weight.

arts.sum: Manchester United reportedly fail with a last-ditch attempt to sign Julio Enciso on loan from Brighton & Hove Albion, with the attacker heading for Ipswich Town.

arts.ttl: Last minute Manchester United attempt to snatch Brighton player from Ipswich Town’s clutches
arts.sum: Manchester United have made a last-minute attempt to sign Julio Enciso from Brighton and Hove Albion, potentially stealing him from Ipswich Town. That’s according to Tuttomercatoweb, who report that Manchester Untied made a last-minute attempt for him as a replacement for Alejandro Garnacho.
